title: Pepita Jiménez
writer: Emilio Fernández, Mauricio Magdaleno, Juan Valera
actors: Rosita Díaz Gimeno, Ricardo Montalban, Fortunio Bonanova
plot: A seminary student falls for his father's fiancee, a beautiful young widow named Pepita Jiménez. Now the cleric has to choose between his love to the woman, loyalty to his father and his religious vocation.
